name: shrey-junior
description: Installable CLI for the Kiwi Control repo-first control plane

scripts.build: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc -b --force && node ../../scripts/remove-macos-metadata.mjs dist
scripts.test: npm run build && node ../../scripts/prepare-runtime-sidecar.mjs --quiet && node --test dist/tests/*.test.js
